message:
fix(sync): add drop handlers for cancel-safe wakeup propagation

Fixes potential lost wakeups when sync primitive futures are dropped
while waiting. This is critical for cancel safety.

Mutex (LockFuture + OwnedLockFuture Drop):
- On drop, attempt to remove ourselves from waiter queue
- If already dequeued by unlock() but we didn't acquire the lock,
  wake the next waiter to pass the "baton"
- Prevents deadlock when cancelled futures held the next wake slot

Semaphore (AcquireFuture + OwnedAcquireFuture Drop):
- Check if we were at the front of the waiter queue
- If so, wake the next waiter after removal
- Ensures permit availability signals aren't lost

Pool (WaitForNotification cleanup):
- Minor refactoring for consistency with other sync primitives

The pattern follows Tokio's "baton passing" approach: when a waiter
is cancelled after being signaled but before acquiring the resource,
it must pass the signal to the next waiter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
